title: Jason Roach (rugby league)
extract: Jason Roach (born (1971-05-02)2 May 1971), also known by the nicknames of "Roachy", or  "Rooster", is a former Scotland international rugby league footballer who played as a fullback or wing in the 1980s, 1990s and 2000s. He played at representative level for Scotland, and at club level for St Helens, Swinton Lions (three spells), Castleford Tigers, Warrington Wolves, London Broncos, Barrow Raiders and the Blackpool Panthers.
